members.name: size
members.description: The size of the carousel, which determines the spacing and sizing of its elements.

members.name: floatNav
members.description:
Whether to use floating navigation, which positions the navigation controls outside of the carousel content and allows them to float over the content.

This is useful for carousels with a lot of content or when you want to maximize the space available for the slides.

members.name: slides
members.description: Slides to be rendered in the carousel.

members.name: contentProps
members.description: Per-slot properties for the component, allowing you to pass props directly to the sub components without needing to use the `v-slot` API. This is useful for quickly customizing the sub components without needing to use the full flexibility of slots.

callables.parameters: ((props: CarouselRootSlotProps & { slide: T; index: number; selected: boolean; }) => any) | undefined
callables.description: Default slot for the carousel component, which can be used to render custom content in the carousel. The slot props include all the necessary information and methods to control the carousel, such as the carousel instance, whether it can scroll next or prev, the selected index, scroll snaps, progress, and methods to scroll next, prev, or to a specific index.
